description_long: This stool features a round, glossy green seat that appears cushioned for comfort, set atop a sturdy wooden frame. The seat is bordered by a dark band, possibly metal or painted wood, adding a touch of contrast and visual interest. The stool is supported by four slightly tapered wooden legs, which are connected near the base by a circular metal footrest for added stability and user comfort. The wood has a rich, dark finish, giving the stool a sophisticated and modern appearance. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as bars, cafes, or public waiting areas. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern stool with a glossy green cushioned seat, dark wooden legs, and a circular metal footrest. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round green seat, dark band, and all four wooden legs with the metal footrest clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the seat and the connection of the legs to the footrest ring.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the symmetry of the legs and the glossy finish of the seat.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back alignment of the legs and the continuous circular footrest.
